meta.title: Cigar Shop. The Art of Patience
meta.description: Cigar Shop, premium destination for cigars, whisky and the ritual of patience. 5 stores across Belgrade.

blog.title: Stories from the smoke.
blog.lead: Ten historical facts about cigars. Columbus, Churchill, Castro, torcedors, Vuelta Abajo. Click for the full story.

hero.tagline: A premium retail chain of the finest cigar brands, quality accessories and premium spirits.

slideB.title: Find us at 5 locations.
slideB.sub: From Vuelta Abajo to Estelí, from Cibao to Jamastran. Every box carries decades of silence and the hand that rolled it.

slideC.title: Five addresses. Five humidors.
slideC.sub: From Ušće to Kosovska, step into a shop where the cigar has waited for you for years.

manifest.title: Your choice, our world.
manifest.lead: Cigar Shop is a premium retail chain of the finest cigar brands, quality accessories and premium spirits.
manifest.body: Five stores across Belgrade. Over 500 cigars from seven countries and more than 260 selected bottles across eight categories. Cigars from Cuba, the Dominican Republic, Nicaragua, Honduras, Costa Rica, Mexico and Italy stand beside Scotch, Irish, Japanese and Oriental whiskies, bourbon, cognac, gin, rum, vodka, domestic rakija and wine. Alongside them, the tools that complete the ritual: cutters, lighters, humidors, ashtrays and travel cases.

brands.title: From field to humidor.
brands.lead: Over 70 brands from seven countries. Each is the seal of a region, a dynasty and decades of patience. Choose a region, discover the story.

gallery.title: Years of silence for a moment of pleasure.
gallery.lead: It all begins long before the first draw — in tobacco leaves that have patiently aged, in the masters who shaped them, and in the knowledge passed on without rush and without noise. When the cigar is finally lit alongside a well-chosen drink, nothing is left to chance; every draw carries its own time, every aroma a story of origin. In that moment, the world does not stop — it simply becomes less important.

humidorCigars.title: Cuba and the New World.
humidorCigars.lead: Our shelf carries two great stories. Click a region to see the curated cigars and setup.

process.title: The hand-made cigar.
process.body1: A hand-made cigar is the meeting of tradition, craft and nature, shaped through a carefully controlled process that lasts months, sometimes years. It all begins on the tobacco plantations, where the leaves grow under ideal climatic conditions and are harvested strictly by hand, layer by layer, so that each reaches full maturity.
process.body2: After the harvest, the leaves go through drying, slowly losing their moisture and developing their distinctive colour and texture. Then fermentation, the key moment in which the tobacco gains depth, complexity and richness of aroma. In this natural process, under the influence of heat and time, unwanted substances are removed and the flavour profile is rounded.
process.body3: When they reach optimal quality, the leaves are carefully selected and sorted by their role in the cigar: as filler, binder or wrapper. Then the torcedor masters step in, their skilled hands turning raw material into a work of art. Each cigar is rolled by hand with precision and feel, the balance between structure and airflow being flawlessly achieved.
process.body4: After shaping, the cigars are laid down to age, a process during which flavours stabilise and interweave into a harmonious whole. Only once they reach their peak are the cigars carefully inspected, labelled and packed. The result is a cigar as a symbol of elegance, patience and supreme craftsmanship, made for those who know how to value a slow pace and the richness of the experience.

humidor.title: Step into the humidor.
humidor.lead: Welcome to a space where time slows down, and the scent of cedar, tobacco and tradition speaks louder than words.
humidor.body: Every cigar is kept in carefully controlled conditions, at the ideal temperature and humidity, so that each leaf retains its fullness, aroma and character — exactly as the masters who created it intended. On the shelves of the humidor, two worlds meet: cigars from the Old World bring elegance, balance and the heritage of a craft refined over decades. Beside them stand cigars from the New World — bolder, more intense, with more attitude, for those who love a full draw and pronounced character. This is not a place for a quick choice or fleeting pleasure. The humidor is a space for those who know the difference between an ordinary moment and a ritual that stays in memory. Cigars do not ask for attention — they simply take it.

spirits.title: Continue with a drink.
spirits.lead: After the cigar is chosen, the story does not end — it just finds its true tone.

spiritsProcess.title: The drink that follows the smoke.
spiritsProcess.body1: Here every draw is rounded out by a drink that accompanies it without competing, but with character that knows how to answer. Whether you choose a whisky with depth, a rum with warmth, or a drink that needs no introduction — every sip is a continuation of the same ritual.
spiritsProcess.body2: No rush — just a balance of taste that follows the smoke rather than trying to overpower it. This is the moment when everything falls into place the way you want it: the cigar, the drink, and the silence between.

gear.title: Tools of the ritual.
gear.lead: A real cigar asks for more than a choice — it asks for an approach.

gearProcess.title: Tools that complete the ritual.
gearProcess.body1: We do not offer accessories — we offer tools that complete the ritual to the last detail. Precise cutters that preserve the structure of the cigar, lighters that ignite without compromise, home humidors that maintain what has already been carefully chosen. And when you carry the ritual with you — travel cases and portable humidors enter the story.
gearProcess.body2: When the cigar gets its moment, ashtrays are there as well — always thoughtful enough to follow the smoke rather than interrupt it. Every piece of equipment has its role, but the shared goal is the same: nothing stands between you and the perfect draw. No improvisation, no shortcuts — just the feeling that everything is exactly where it needs to be.
